reference: Hello. I am a desperate mother! My eleven-week-old has silent reflux. He was on Novalac Hypoallergenic and did very well with the milk. There was no gas, and his tummy functioned daily. Then I put him on Nexium, which made him constipated. My pediatrician said to stop the Nexium and use Novalac Anti-Reflux. Now he is gassy, fussy, and even more constipated. He is suffering, and I am going back to work next week. I need sleep. Will Nestor gel help? Can I put it in the Novalac Anti-Reflux? I heard that it also helps to soften stools. Please help.
text: Hello, I am a desperate mother. My eleven-week-old has silent reflux. He was on Novolac, hypoallergenic, and did well with milk. There was no gas, and his tummy functions well. Then I put him on Nexium, which made him constipated. My pediatrician said to stop in Nexium and use Novolac anti-reflux. Now he is gassy, fussy, and even more constipated. He is suffering, and I am going back to work. Missy, I need sleep. Will Nestor gel help? Can I put it in the Novolac anti-reflux? I heard that it also helps to solve seizures. Please help.
